# AlarmClockOff

## Tags
morning, turn-off

## Categories
devices, notifications, time

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/alarm-clock-off)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::AlarmClockOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        AlarmClockOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
